rows.label: tev041501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev041501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bazis about humans.

rows.label: tev041501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev041501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bazis if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Bazis about Blue Bloods.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Bazis about your real body.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bazis about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Bazis about Uzoma.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Bazis about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041501_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Bazis about Uzoma.

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0001
rows.name: Is it true your bodies are machines?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0002
rows.name:
This means you cannot
make children. Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0003
rows.name:
You can come back to life, but not
increase numbers. Is this not problem?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Perhaps your machines can create
children? But it is not same. Very sad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0005
rows.name:
I hope you find real bodies soon. Then you
can make families like me and Hexuna.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Cavern Clan forced Grandfather
Auld to work when he was ill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0011
rows.name:
If he fell, they hit him. Doused
him with ice water. They called
such things "punishment."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0012
rows.name: Curs made his illness worse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0013
rows.name: He may not have long to live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0014
rows.name:
It is unfair! I wanted him
to see my children...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0020
rows.name:
I found injured BLADE during
fight with Growth. I brought
BLADE to your medical center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Next day, BLADE was completely
healed! Came to thank me in person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0022
rows.name:
For brief moment, I wished I had
mechanical body. But moment passed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I like having real flesh. Fights are
more fun when scars do not heal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0030
rows.name:
You can return to your real
bodies now? This is good news![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Again you will know joys of birthing
children. Joys of raising proper family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Go make many babies with person you
love. Make babies and happiness![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG1001
rows.name:
In our folklore, when one Bias weds,
another is blessed with child.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG1002
rows.name:
This time it is our turn. Hexuna
and I will make Grandfather Auld
happy. We will make strong child![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2001
rows.name:
Uzoma went to Behemoth's
Shadows in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2002
rows.name:
He brought back rare fruit
called emerald grape. We used
it to celebrate Helna's birth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2003
rows.name: Uzoma is good-hearted Bias. Brave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2004
rows.name: He is good choice for next chieftain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2010
rows.name:
Hexuna had trouble during labor.
We thought she might die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2011
rows.name:
But Hexuna healed at end of Grandfather's
funeral. She had baby without trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2012
rows.name:
You must have found very large
jacul for Grandfather's soul![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2013
rows.name: That soul kept Helna safe. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2018
rows.name:
He died well. Never gave in to Cavern
Clan. Returned to beasts as flesh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2019
rows.name:
He let himself be caught.
Gave all to save us. Uzoma
kept Tree Clan standing tall![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2020
rows.name: So passes mighty Bias and true warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041501_MSG2021
rows.name:
I will tell Helna tales
of Uzoma someday.[ST:wait ]
